title: myosurus minimus var. sessiliflorus
intro: Myosurus minimus var. sessiliflorus is a rare, annual flowering plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the lesser mouse-tail or small mouse-tail. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and other minor health issues. The health benefits of Myosurus minimus var. sessiliflorus include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties and treat a range of health conditions.
